tests.scenario: Full content access without payment on first launch
steps: Install the app on a new device
Open the app for the first time
Skip any onboarding screens
Navigate to the content library
Attempt to open multiple meditation sessions and courses
tests.expected_result: All meditation sessions and courses open and play without any payment prompt or locked content indicator.

tests.scenario: Content remains accessible after dismissing donation prompt
steps: Open the app
When a donation prompt appears, dismiss it
Navigate to the full content library
Open several sessions across different categories
tests.expected_result: All content remains fully accessible after dismissing the donation prompt with no sessions locked or restricted.

tests.scenario: No ads displayed during an active meditation session
steps: Open the app
Select any meditation session
Begin playback
Wait through the entire session duration
Observe the screen throughout playback
tests.expected_result: No advertisement of any kind appears during the session playback.

tests.scenario: No ads displayed when navigating between sessions
steps: Open the app
Complete one meditation session
Navigate to a second session
Observe all screen transitions between the two sessions
tests.expected_result: No advertisement appears on any screen during navigation between sessions.

tests.scenario: Donation prompt has a visible skip button on first launch
steps: Install the app on a new Android device
Launch the app for the first time
Wait for the donation prompt to appear
Observe the prompt without scrolling
tests.expected_result: A skip or dismiss button is visible on the donation prompt without requiring any scrolling.

tests.scenario: Skipping donation prompt grants full app access
steps: Launch the app for the first time
When the donation prompt appears, tap the skip button
Navigate to the content library
Attempt to open a meditation session
tests.expected_result: The user is taken directly into the app with full access to all content after skipping the donation prompt.

tests.scenario: Donation prompt does not reappear after a completed donation
steps: Open the app
Complete a donation through the in-app donation flow
Close and reopen the app three times
Navigate between multiple screens each time
tests.expected_result: The donation prompt does not appear on any subsequent session after the donation has been completed.

tests.scenario: Donation prompt does not reappear within the same session
steps: Open the app
Dismiss the donation prompt
Navigate through at least five different screens
Return to the home screen
tests.expected_result: The donation prompt does not reappear at any point during the same app session after being dismissed once.

tests.scenario: Audio continues when screen locks during session
steps: Open the app
Start any meditation session
Allow the device screen to lock automatically after 30 seconds
Wait 60 seconds without touching the device
tests.expected_result: The meditation audio continues playing uninterrupted after the screen locks.

tests.scenario: Audio continues when earbuds are connected during session
steps: Open the app
Connect a pair of Bluetooth earbuds
Start a meditation session
Let the session play for at least 2 minutes
Observe whether audio stops at any point
tests.expected_result: Audio plays continuously through the earbuds for the full duration without stopping.

tests.scenario: Streak syncs correctly after switching devices
steps: Complete a meditation session on Device A while logged in
Log into the same account on Device B
Wait up to 60 seconds
Check the streak count on Device B
tests.expected_result: The streak count on Device B matches the streak count on Device A within 60 seconds of login.

tests.scenario: Course progress syncs across devices
steps: Complete two sessions of a course on Device A
Log into the same account on Device B
Navigate to the same course
Observe which sessions are marked as completed
tests.expected_result: The same two sessions are marked as completed on Device B as on Device A.

tests.scenario: Session marked complete when user exits in final 10 seconds
steps: Open the app and start a short meditation session
Wait until the session is within the last 10 seconds of audio
Exit the session by pressing back
Check the session history and streak
tests.expected_result: The session is recorded as completed in the session history and the streak is updated accordingly.

tests.scenario: Session not marked complete when user exits well before end
steps: Open the app and start a meditation session
Exit the session after 30 seconds when it is far from completion
Check the session history
tests.expected_result: The session is not recorded as completed and the streak is not updated.

tests.scenario: Queued sessions play consecutively without user interaction
steps: Open the app
Add three meditation sessions to a queue
Start the queue
Lock the device screen
Wait for the first session to end
tests.expected_result: The second session begins playing automatically after the first ends without the user unlocking the phone or interacting with the app.

tests.scenario: Queue feature is accessible from the session selection screen
steps: Open the app
Navigate to the meditation library
Locate the option to add a session to a queue
Add two sessions to the queue
Confirm the queue is visible before starting
tests.expected_result: The queue option is clearly visible on the session screen and both sessions appear in the queue before playback begins.

tests.scenario: Download button is visible on session screen
steps: Open the app
Navigate to any meditation session page
Observe the session detail screen
tests.expected_result: A download button is clearly visible on the session page without scrolling.

tests.scenario: Downloaded session plays without internet connection
steps: Open the app while connected to the internet
Download a meditation session
Enable airplane mode on the device
Navigate to the downloaded session and press play
tests.expected_result: The session plays fully without buffering or error messages despite having no internet connection.

tests.scenario: Beginner course is prominently displayed for new users
steps: Install the app on a new device
Complete onboarding
Navigate to the courses section
tests.expected_result: A beginner course is displayed prominently at the top or highlighted section of the courses screen.

tests.scenario: Beginner course sessions are listed in sequential order with labels
steps: Open the app
Navigate to the beginner course
Open the course detail page
Observe the session list
tests.expected_result: Sessions are listed in numbered sequential order and each session displays its sequence number and estimated duration.

tests.scenario: User can manually log a past meditation session
steps: Open the app
Navigate to streak settings or session history
Select the option to manually add a session
Choose yesterday's date
Confirm the entry
tests.expected_result: The manually logged session appears in the session history for yesterday's date and the streak updates to include that day.

tests.scenario: Manually logged session does not duplicate an existing entry
steps: Open the app on a day where a session was already completed via the app
Attempt to manually add another session for the same date
Confirm the entry
tests.expected_result: The system either prevents the duplicate entry or merges it, and the streak count for that day remains at one without duplication.

tests.scenario: User can disable in-app swipe gestures from settings
steps: Open the app
Navigate to settings
Locate the gesture controls option
Toggle swipe gestures off
Return to the main app screen
tests.expected_result: The swipe gesture toggle is present in settings and after disabling it, in-app swipe gestures no longer trigger.

tests.scenario: Device navigation gestures work correctly after disabling in-app swipes
steps: Open the app
Disable in-app swipe gestures in settings
Use the device's native swipe-from-edge gesture to go back
Use the device's swipe-up gesture to go home
tests.expected_result: Both native device navigation gestures function correctly without being intercepted by the app.
